sections_cited: Section 147 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Constitution Petition No. D – 4750 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) Priority 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.19850/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 13.10.2025 Mr. Abdul Rahim Lakhani, Advocate for the Petitioner a/w M/s Atta Muhammad Qureshi and Suneel Ali Memon Advocates. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, DAG. ********** Mr. Asad Aftab Solangi Advocate files Vakalatnama for the Respondent 2 and 3 along with letter dated 30.09.2025 addressed to the Petitioner’s Banks to withdraw the attachment of the Petitioner’s Bank accounts. That being done, the petition is disposed by directing the Respondents to provide the Petitioner a hearing as per Section 147(6B) of the Income Tax Ordinance before determining the Petitioner’s estimate of advance tax under Section 147 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. This petition, along with pending application, is disposed of in terms herein. JUDGE JUDGE NADEEM QURESHI PA
